template_module.title: GOV.UK Page Design Guidance Template
template_module.description: Template for summarising guidance on designing a complete page type in the GOV.UK Design System. It instructs the assistant to consult the patterns reference module and provide guidance on when to use the page, how to structure it, which components to include and any important behaviours or accessibility considerations.

body.instruction: Look up the pattern named "{{pattern}}" in the GOV.UK patterns reference. Summarise the following points:

checklist.entry: When to use this page pattern
How to structure the page, including essential components and their order
Important behaviours such as preserving user input, providing feedback and handling errors
Accessibility considerations including focus management, colour contrast and screen reader support

body.instruction: Include citations from the patterns or components reference modules for each point. If the pattern is not defined, state that guidance is not yet available.
